description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced yard, featuring a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The structure is primarily dark in color, with large windows and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a pool, patio, and rooftop terrace. The property is landscaped with several trees, shrubs, and a mix of paved and grassy areas, as well as a driveway leading to a covered carport. Recreational amenities such as a playground and outdoor seating are visible, enhancing the family-friendly atmosphere. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back and accessible via exterior stairs. The overall layout is open and spacious, with a clear emphasis on outdoor living and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, rooftop terrace, pool, and landscaped yard, featuring a dark exterior and open, family-friendly layout.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway, carport, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlights the pool, patio, rooftop terrace, and backyard playground, with more visible outdoor amenities.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the rear facade, additional windows, and the open backyard with trees and recreational areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the side yard, secondary entrance, and more of the surrounding fence and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
